texto: Instead of being a gift that separates us from the animals, free will has become my gaoler. Junkies are the ultimate outsider, not only are we outside of society: we are outside of nature. I spit, turn, and wander towards the beach. Heroin gave me wings but took away the sky.
explicacao: Citação de Drew Gates sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “Instead of being a gift that separates us from the animals, free will has become my gaoler. Junki…” articula sucesso, addiction, drugs em registro de sucesso, com relevância para contextos como drugs e heroin.

frase_original: Instead of being a gift that separates us from the animals, free will has become my gaoler. Junkies are the ultimate outsider, not only are we outside of society: we are outside of nature. I spit, turn, and wander towards the beach. Heroin gave me wings but took away the sky.
